ayahs.arabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Hal ata AAala al-insani heenunmina addahri lam yakun shay-an mathkoora
ayahs.translation: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna khalaqna al-insanamin nutfatin amshajin nabtaleehi fajaAAalnahusameeAAan baseera
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture[1811] that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna hadaynahu assabeelaimma shakiran wa-imma kafoora
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna aAAtadna lilkafireenasalasila waaghlalan wasaAAeera
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna al-abrara yashraboona min ka/sinkana mizajuha kafoora
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kāfūr,[1812]

ayahs.arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: AAaynan yashrabu biha AAibaduAllahi yufajjiroonaha tafjeera
ayahs.translation: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allāh will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

ayahs.arabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yoofoona binnathri wayakhafoonayawman kana sharruhu mustateera
ayahs.translation: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

ayahs.arabic: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: WayutAAimona attaAAamaAAala hubbihi miskeenan wayateeman waaseera
ayahs.translation: And they give food in spite of love for it[1813] to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Innama nutAAimukum liwajhi Allahila nureedu minkum jazaan wala shukoora
ayahs.translation: [Saying], "We feed you only for the face [i.e., approval] of Allāh. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nakhafu min rabbinayawman AAaboosan qamtareera
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

ayahs.arabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Fawaqahumu Allahu sharra thalikaalyawmi walaqqahum nadratan wasuroora
ayahs.translation: So Allāh will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

ayahs.arabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wajazahum bima sabaroojannatan wahareera
ayahs.translation: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].

ayahs.arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Muttaki-eena feeha AAala al-ara-ikila yarawna feeha shamsan wala zamhareera
ayahs.translation: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold.

ayahs.arabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wadaniyatan AAalayhim thilaluhawathullilat qutoofuha tathleela
ayahs.translation: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.

ayahs.arabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
ayahs.transliteration: Wayutafu AAalayhim bi-aniyatinmin fiddatin waakwabin kanat qawareera
ayahs.translation: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],

ayahs.arabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qawareera min fiddatinqaddarooha taqdeera
ayahs.translation: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.

ayahs.arabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayusqawna feeha ka/san kanamizajuha zanjabeela
ayahs.translation: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger

ayahs.arabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: AAaynan feeha tusammasalsabeela
ayahs.translation: [From] a fountain within it [i.e., Paradise] named Salsabeel.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayatoofu AAalayhim wildanunmukhalladoona itha raaytahum hasibtahum lu/lu-anmanthoora
ayahs.translation: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-itha raayta thamma raaytanaAAeeman wamulkan kabeera
ayahs.translation: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

ayahs.arabic: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: AAaliyahum thiyabu sundusinkhudrun wa-istabraqun wahulloo asawira minfiddatin wasaqahum rabbuhum sharaban tahoora
ayahs.translation: Upon them [i.e., the inhabitants] will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna hatha kana lakum jazaanwakana saAAyukum mashkoora
ayahs.translation: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu nazzalnaAAalayka alqur-ana tanzeela
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muḥammad], the Qur’ān progressively.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Fasbir lihukmi rabbikawala tutiAA minhum athiman aw kafoora
ayahs.translation: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wathkuri isma rabbikabukratan waaseela
ayahs.translation: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

ayahs.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wamina allayli fasjud lahu wasabbihhulaylan taweela
ayahs.translation: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt [i.e., praise] Him a long [part of the] night.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna haola-i yuhibboonaalAAajilata wayatharoona waraahum yawmanthaqeela
ayahs.translation: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them[1814] a grave Day.

ayahs.arabic: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu khalaqnahum washadadnaasrahum wa-itha shi/na baddalna amthalahumtabdeela
ayahs.translation: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna hathihi tathkiratun famanshaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeela
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama tashaoona illa anyashaa Allahu inna Allaha kanaAAaleeman hakeema
ayahs.translation: And you do not will except that Allāh wills. Indeed, Allāh is ever Knowing and Wise.

ayahs.arabic: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Yudkhilu man yashao fee rahmatihiwaththalimeena aAAadda lahum AAathabanaleema
ayahs.translation: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
